notes_placeholder:
Write your notes in Markdown...

Tip: drag & drop images here.
first_run_notice: First launch: downloading model (~1.5 GB). This happens only once.
error_start_recording: Could not start recording. Check microphone permissions.
privacy_note: All processing is local. No data leaves your machine.
confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this session?
setup_tagline: Real-time local transcription for classes and meetings. Everything runs on your Mac — no cloud, no data leaves your machine.
setup_feature_1: Live transcription powered by Whisper AI on Apple Silicon
setup_feature_2: Take Markdown notes alongside the transcript
setup_feature_3: 100% offline — no accounts, no telemetry, fully private
setup_choose_model_subtitle: Select a model optimized for your hardware
setup_first_time_notice: This may take a few minutes on first launch
setup_mic_subtitle: Steno needs microphone access to transcribe in real-time.
setup_mic_denied: Microphone access denied. Please enable it in System Settings > Privacy & Security > Microphone.
setup_ready_subtitle: Steno is ready to transcribe. Start a session to begin.
model_confirm_delete: Delete this model? You can re-download it later.
model_cannot_delete_active: Cannot delete the active model. Switch to another model first.
model_exceeds_ram: May be slow — requires {min_ram} GB RAM
settings_reset_description: Delete all sessions, clear settings, and reset the app to its initial state. Downloaded models are preserved.
settings_reset_confirm_1:
This will permanently delete ALL sessions and reset all settings. Downloaded models will be preserved.

Are you sure?
settings_reset_confirm_2: Last chance — this action CANNOT be undone. Continue?
portaudio_missing: PortAudio library not found. Recording is disabled. Install it with: brew install portaudio
error_loading_models: Could not load models. Check your connection and try again.
error_generic_retry: Something went wrong. Please try again.
